ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_rates" (
  "mortality_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality rate record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individuals (1: Male, 2: Female) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individuals */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "ylds_number" REAL /* Number of Years of Life Lost due to premature death (YLDs) */,
  "mortality_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Mortality rate per 100,000 people */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the mortality rate */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the mortality data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the mortality data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_rates_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, country, state) */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., disease, injury, accident) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-14, 15-29) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ylds" (
  "yld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each YLD */,
  "yld_name" TEXT /* Name of the YLD (e.g., YLDs due to cancer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the YLD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the given location, cause, and year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_trends_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause of death */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-dataset relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the data */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset downloaded */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format used for the download */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the download occurred */,
  "download_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the download */,
  "downloaded_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES mortality_rates ("mortality_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
